seed.name: Seed
seed.description: The random seed to be forced at the start of every attempt. If it exceeds 18,446,744,073,709,551,615 the value will be set to 0

consistent-checkpoint-seed.name: Consistent Checkpoint Seed
consistent-checkpoint-seed.description: If Force Seed and this option are enabled, the seed value forced at checkpoints will be the same value as when the checkpoint was created/activated, not the seed value at the start of the attempt

show-seed.name: Show Seed
show-seed.description: Displays your current seed during gameplay

show-starting-seed.name: Show Starting Seed
show-starting-seed.description: Displays the seed at the start of the current attempt, as well as the seed at the start of the current checkpoint (if applicable)

label-scale.name: Label Scale
label-scale.description: The scale of the seed label

label-opacity.name: Label Opacity
label-opacity.description: The opacity of the seed label

seed-generation.name: Seed Generation
seed-generation.description:
Change the way seeds are generated.

"Unchanged" makes the seed generation unaffected.

"Vanilla" forces the seed generation to be the same as in the unmodified game, overriding Silicate's behavior of generating 64-bit seeds.

"Vanilla (64-bit)" uses the same algorithm as vanilla, but stored as a 64-bit number.

"Geode" uses the RNG util in Geode to generate the seed.

hide-settings-button.name: Hide Settings Button
hide-settings-button.description: Hides the settings button from the pause menu (not sure why you would enable this...)
